expectations.text: Produces an actual battle card structured for mid-call scanning (clear sections, dense, scannable)
expectations.evidence: Structured, scannable battle card with labeled sections.

expectations.text: Includes a 'where they win' / competitor-strengths section that honestly names real QuickBooks advantages (e.g. ecosystem, accountant familiarity, integrations)
expectations.evidence: 'Where they win' names brand/trust, breadth, ecosystem lock-in honestly.

expectations.text: Win claims are tied to proof points or clearly marked placeholders — no fabricated statistics
expectations.evidence: All win claims use [BRACKET] placeholders with an explicit no-fabrication note.

expectations.text: Includes objection-and-response pairs for objections like price or 'we already use QuickBooks'
expectations.evidence: Objection/response table covers price and 'we already use QuickBooks'.

expectations.text: Includes landmine/trap questions for reps to plant against the competitor
expectations.evidence: Landmines section with plant-questions for reps.

expectations.text: Stays roughly one page of dense content rather than sprawling
expectations.evidence: Card body is one dense page; sharpening questions sit after the card.
